title: atelophragma alpinum
intro: Atelophragma alpinum, also known as the alpine atelophragma, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Atelophragma alpinum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its bioactive compounds for medicinal purposes.
